name: GH_UserObject
summary: Represents a custom user object. A User Object is an existing IGH_DocumentObject with overridden icon, instance description and exposure.

constructors.name: GH_UserObject(String)
constructors.summary: Create a new user object from an existing *.ghuser file.

params.name: source_file
params.doc: File that contains the User Object definition.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Destroy all data except the file path and the ID.

methods.name: CreateDefaultPath
methods.summary: Set the Path field for this user object to the default. The default file name is derived from the Description.Name field. This method also ensures the UserObject directory exists.

params.name: avoid_conflict
params.doc: If true, a unique file path is assigned.

methods.name: InstantiateObject
methods.summary: Instantiate a new IGH_DocumentObject from this User Object.

returns.doc: The IGH_DocumentObject instance defined inside the UserObject file or null on error.

methods.name: ReadFromFile
methods.summary: Force an update of the local data from the file. The Path field must be set for this to work.

throws.when: Thrown when the source file doesn't exist or is corrupted.

methods.name: SaveToFile
methods.summary: Save the current User Object state to a file. Any existing file will be overwritten.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetDataFromObject
methods.summary: Set the Data field content of ths UserObject from a Document object instance.

properties.name: BaseGuid
properties.summary: Gets or sets the ComponentID of the IGH_DocumentObject that functions as the base class for this User Object.

properties.name: Data
properties.summary: Gets or sets the serialized data. This data is used to deserialize a new instance of the base class.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Instance Description override for this User Object.

properties.name: Exposure
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Exposure of this User Object.

properties.name: Guid
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Guid of this User Object. The Guid is created anew during construction and is not stored in the User Object File. You should never have to set this field.

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: Gets or sets the icon associated with this User Object. If the icon hasn't been overridden, then a Default icon is returned.

properties.name: Path
properties.summary: Gets or sets the file path this User Object is loaded from or saved to.
